title: 9 ft Snow Tipped Green Fir Garland Christmas with Pine Cones for Home Decoration, Artificial Garlands Christmas for Xmas Tree Stairs Fireplaces Garden Decor, Staircase Garland
features: Soft And Durable Material:Our 9 feet snow tipped garland with 15 pine cones is made from a durable plastic PVC with a realistic look that is also long-lasting, it is non-toxic.This decor, along with the memories made, will last for a long time of holidays and decorating

Extra-Long 9-Foot snow tipped Garland with Pine Cones For Maximum Coverage: Measuring 270cm x 25cm, this long snow tipped Christmas garland is perfect for decorating Christmas trees, fireplace garlands, Christmas stair garlands, or even as a stunning Christmas table decoration. Ideal for both Christmas garlands indoor and Christmas outdoor decorations

Customizable Creativity: The humanized design of our Xmas artificial garland allows you to easily trim and shape it to fit your unique decor needs. Whether you want a long flowing arrangement or smaller sections to accentuate different areas, this garland provides endless creative possibilities, you can also use pine cones to decorate any place you want
Green Tinsel Christmas garland: The artificial garland is natural dark green, with a realistic appearance and looks like a real plant, is a perfect complement to Christmas decorations
Multiple Uses: The snow tipped Christmas garland rattan is a great decoration for the door, window, wall, garden, stairs, fireplaces, Christmas tree etc
